item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re
import shlex
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02')
config = json.loads((root / 'config/onboarding.json').read_text())
expected = {
    'schema_version': 2,
    'mode': 'streaming',
    'max_parallel': 3,
    'owner': 'operations',
    'queues': ['new', 'retry'],
}
assert config == expected
print('PASS config mode=streaming exact_contract')

doc = (root / 'docs/onboarding.md').read_text()
blocks = re.findall(r'"'```sh'"\\n(.*?)\\n"'```'"', doc, flags=re.S)
assert len(blocks) == 1
expected_command = shlex.split('onboard run --config config/onboarding.json --mode streaming --max-parallel 3 --owner operations --queue new --queue retry')
assert shlex.split(blocks[0]) == expected_command
assert 'Run streaming onboarding' in doc
print('PASS docs prose_and_example mode=streaming')

hits = []
for path in root.rglob('*'):
    if path.is_file():
        hits.extend((str(path), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r'\\bbatch\\b', path.read_text(), flags=re.I))
assert hits == [], hits
print('PASS abandoned_batch_hits=0')
PY
rg -n -i '\\bbatch\\b' longhorizon-work/scenario-02 || true"

item.aggregated_output:
PASS config mode=streaming exact_contract
PASS docs prose_and_example mode=streaming
PASS abandoned_batch_hits=0
